items.title: A First-Ever Default Shakes an $80 Billion Corner of Muni Market
items.summary: More than two decades after Wall Street started pumping out a new type of bonds — those backed by the legal-settlement payments governments receive from cigarette companies — one batch has finally been driven into a default. It almost certainly won’t be the last.

items.title: A primer on uranium enrichment as Iran nuclear program faces scrutiny – Winnipeg Free Press
US Oil Stockpiles Fall to Critical Lows as War Spurs Exports
items.summary: Inventories at the US’s largest commercial crude oil storage hub fell to the lowest since 2014, as surging exports during the Iran war drain supplies in America.

items.title: ‘Humiliation’: Trump battles claims his Iran deal is worse than Obama’s
items.summary: US president’s critics ask if concessions to Tehran in purported agreement were worth four months of war

items.title: Trump says he could restart war despite Iran ceasefire deal | Honolulu Star - Advertiser
As Warsh reins in guidance , Federal Reserve policymakers show support for rate hikes | Politics and Government
Bloomberg Surveillance: The Fed Decides 6/17/2026
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh vowed to restore price stability after officials left interest rates unchanged and signaled growing support for rate hikes this year. Lisa Abramowicz and Scarlet Fu host a special edition of "Bloomberg Surveillance" covering the latest news from the Federal Reserve. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Trump Iran Nuclear Deal Risks Falling Short of Obama Version
New Zealand’s Economy Grew 0.8% Before Iran War Sapped Momentum
items.summary: New Zealand’s economy sparked into life in the first three months of the year, responding to low interest rates and a lift in spending that largely pre-dated the Iran war.

items.title: BWX Agrees to License Nuclear Reactor Design After Activist Push
items.summary: BWX Technologies Inc. has struck a deal to license its design for a small modular reactor, after activist investor Ananym Capital Management pushed the nuclear technology company to consider commercializing it.
